response.justification: While Maria is a talented software engineer with strong systems experience and performance optimization background, she lacks the core technical expertise required for this role: SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture optimization, and deep neural network workload analysis. Her entire career has been in software development (web, mobile, backend, DevOps) with no demonstrated experience in hardware architecture or AI accelerator optimization. This is a fundamental gap that cannot be bridged at the Principal level where immediate expertise is required.
strengths: Extensive performance optimization experience with low-latency systems, caching strategies, and async I/O at scale (handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Staff-level systems thinking demonstrated through microservices architecture, DevOps infrastructure, CI/CD pipeline design, and Kubernetes deployment experience
Proven ability to learn new domains and languages (D, Swift, C++, Java) across web, mobile, embedded, and systems programming contexts
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture design, or chip-level optimization—core requirements for the position
No background in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD systems, or AI accelerator workload optimization despite these being key responsibilities and preferred qualifications
Career entirely focused on software engineering with no demonstrated hardware-software co-design or hardware-level performance analysis experience

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP modeling and hardware architecture expertise
Strong performance optimization and systems design experience
